positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a majestic, ethereal owl perched on a branch made of glowing crescent moons. The owl has geometric feather patterns and wide, knowing eyes that glow softly. Around the owl, abstract constellations, swirling nebulae in deep indigo and gold, and stylized floral mandalas bloom. The composition is centered and balanced, featuring bold, thick linework suitable for screen printing. The overall aesthetic should evoke cosmic wonder and ancient wisdom, utilizing high contrast, complementary colors (deep blues, brilliant golds, teal accents), and clean, graphic shapes. Suitable for a repeating or single-focus apparel print. Vector art style, modern tattoo ink aesthetic, high detail, flat illustration.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, watermark, text, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, logos, trademarks, copyrighted, realistic photo, photorealism, cinematic, messy, dirty, gradient, gradient fade, poor composition, noise
